meaning: A transition used to set aside one issue and move on to another without dismissing the first.
definition: A transition used to set aside one issue and move on to another without dismissing the first.
example: Aside from that minor issue with the color scheme, the new website design is excellent.
exampleHindi: रंग योजना के साथ उस छोटी सी समस्या के अलावा, नई वेबसाइट का डिज़ाइन उत्कृष्ट है।

meaning: To avoid talking about the main topic directly, often because it is uncomfortable.
definition: [object Object]
example: Stop beating around the bush and tell me what the feedback on my proposal was.
exampleHindi: इधर-उधर घूमना बंद करो और मुझे बताओ कि मेरे प्रस्ताव पर क्या प्रतिक्रिया थी।

meaning: Careful and cautious before speaking or acting to avoid risks or mistakes.
definition: Wary and unwilling to take risks; careful to consider all circumstances.
example: The CEO was very circumspect in his comments about the upcoming acquisition.
exampleHindi: आगामी अधिग्रहण के बारे में अपनी टिप्पणियों में सीईओ बहुत सतर्क थे।

meaning: Helpful advice or criticism aimed at improving someone's performance rather than just pointing out mistakes.
definition: Supportive and actionable information given to an employee to help them improve their skills or performance.
example: The manager provided constructive feedback that helped the writer improve the article's flow.
exampleHindi: प्रबंधक ने रचनात्मक प्रतिक्रिया प्रदान की जिससे लेखक को लेख के प्रवाह को बेहतर बनाने में मदद मिली।

meaning: To express something in a very careful or polite way to avoid causing offense.
definition: To express something in a very careful or polite way to avoid causing offense.
example: She couched her feedback in polite language so that the developer would not feel discouraged.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने अपनी प्रतिक्रिया विनम्र भाषा में दी ताकि डेवलपर को हतोत्साहित महसूस न हो।

meaning: A difficult scenario that needs to be handled with extreme care and sensitivity.
definition: A difficult scenario that needs to be handled with extreme care and sensitivity.
example: Handling the dispute between the two co-founders is a delicate situation that requires patience.
exampleHindi: दो सह-संस्थापकों के बीच विवाद को संभालना एक नाजुक स्थिति है जिसके लिए धैर्य की आवश्यकता होती है।

meaning: Able to handle difficult situations or sensitive relationships without offending anyone.
definition: Able to handle difficult situations or sensitive relationships without offending anyone.
example: Our team leader is very diplomatic; she always handles customer complaints smoothly.
exampleHindi: हमारा टीम लीडर बहुत कूटनीतिक है; वह हमेशा ग्राहकों की शिकायतों को सुचारू रूप से संभालती है।

meaning: The quality of behaving or speaking carefully to avoid causing offense or revealing private information.
definition: The quality of behaving or speaking carefully to avoid causing offense or revealing private information.
example: Because the negotiations are sensitive, we must handle this matter with the utmost discretion.
exampleHindi: चूँकि बातचीत संवेदनशील है, इसलिए हमें इस मामले को अत्यंत विवेक से संभालना चाहिए।

meaning: A polite phrase used to show you have listened to someone's opinion before expressing a different view.
definition: A polite phrase used to show you have listened to someone's opinion before expressing a different view.
example: I appreciate your perspective on the budget, but we need to focus on hiring more staff right now.
exampleHindi: मैं बजट पर आपके दृष्टिकोण की सराहना करता हूं, लेकिन हमें अभी और अधिक कर्मचारियों की भर्ती पर ध्यान देने की जरूरत है।

word: I SEE WHERE YOU'RE COMING FROM
meaning: A phrase used to validate someone's line of reasoning even if you do not fully agree with their conclusion.
definition: A phrase used to validate someone's line of reasoning even if you do not fully agree with their conclusion.
example: I see where you're coming from with the marketing budget, but we cannot afford it this quarter.
exampleHindi: मैं देख रहा हूं कि आप मार्केटिंग बजट के साथ कहां से आ रहे हैं, लेकिन हम इस तिमाही में इसे वहन नहीं कर सकते।

meaning: Not causing anger, resentment, or hurt feelings; polite.
definition: Not causing anger, resentment, or hurt feelings; polite.
example: He chose an inoffensive way to decline the invitation, saying he had a prior commitment.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने निमंत्रण को अस्वीकार करने का एक अप्रभावी तरीका चुना, यह कहते हुए कि उनकी पूर्व प्रतिबद्धता थी।

meaning: A phrase used to resolve an argument by accepting that both sides have different opinions and will not change them.
definition: A phrase used to resolve an argument by accepting that both sides have different opinions and will not change them.
example: After debating the design for an hour, we decided to agree to disagree and move on to other issues.
exampleHindi: डिज़ाइन पर एक घंटे तक बहस करने के बाद, हमने असहमत होने और अन्य मुद्दों पर आगे बढ़ने पर सहमति व्यक्त करने का निर्णय लिया।

meaning: To be careful about the words you choose, especially to remain polite and professional.
definition: To be careful about the words you choose, especially to remain polite and professional.
example: In client meetings, it is vital to mind your language and avoid using casual slang.
exampleHindi: ग्राहक बैठकों में, अपनी भाषा पर ध्यान देना और आकस्मिक अपशब्दों के प्रयोग से बचना महत्वपूर्ण है।

meaning: Not showing a clear opinion, decision, or promise.
definition: Not showing a clear opinion, decision, or promise.
example: The director gave a non-committal answer when asked if the project would be extended.
exampleHindi: यह पूछे जाने पर कि क्या परियोजना को आगे बढ़ाया जाएगा, निदेशक ने स्पष्ट उत्तर नहीं दिया।

meaning: Not likely to make someone feel worried, unsafe, or defensive.
definition: Not likely to make someone feel worried, unsafe, or defensive.
example: We should use a non-threatening tone of voice when addressing employee performance issues.
exampleHindi: कर्मचारी प्रदर्शन के मुद्दों को संबोधित करते समय हमें बिना धमकी वाले स्वर का उपयोग करना चाहिए।

meaning: A phrase used to show that you take someone's worry seriously before explaining a counter-argument.
definition: A phrase used to show that you take someone's worry seriously before explaining a counter-argument.
example: Not to minimize your concern about the timeline, but we do have a backup plan in place.
exampleHindi: समयसीमा के बारे में आपकी चिंता को कम करने के लिए नहीं, लेकिन हमारे पास एक बैकअप योजना है।

meaning: Looking at facts and evidence without letting personal feelings or opinions influence you.
definition: Looking at facts and evidence without letting personal feelings or opinions influence you.
example: Objectively speaking, the new proposal is more cost-effective than the current plan.
exampleHindi: वस्तुनिष्ठ रूप से कहें तो, नया प्रस्ताव वर्तमान योजना की तुलना में अधिक लागत प्रभावी है।

meaning: Information given confidentially that is not meant to be publicly reported or quoted.
definition: Information provided to a journalist that cannot be published or attributed to the source.
example: Off the record, the manager admitted that the department might be restructured next year.
exampleHindi: ऑफ़ द रिकॉर्ड, प्रबंधक ने स्वीकार किया कि अगले वर्ष विभाग का पुनर्गठन किया जा सकता है।

meaning: Used to describe how something appears initially, before looking at it more closely.
definition: Used to describe how something appears initially, before looking at it more closely.
example: On the face of it, the proposal looks solid, but we need to check the detailed financial calculations.
exampleHindi: प्रथम दृष्टया, प्रस्ताव ठोस दिखता है, लेकिन हमें विस्तृत वित्तीय गणनाओं की जांच करने की आवश्यकता है।

meaning: To argue against an idea or plan, even if you agree with it, to test its strengths and weaknesses.
definition: To argue against an idea or plan, even if you agree with it, to test its strengths and weaknesses.
example: I agree with your strategy, but let me play devil's advocate for a moment to identify potential risks.
exampleHindi: मैं आपकी रणनीति से सहमत हूं, लेकिन संभावित जोखिमों की पहचान करने के लिए मुझे एक पल के लिए शैतान के वकील की भूमिका निभाने दीजिए।

meaning: Wise, sensible, and likely to bring advantage in a particular situation.
definition: Wise, sensible, and likely to bring advantage in a particular situation.
example: It was not politic to bring up the budget deficit during the celebratory dinner.
exampleHindi: जश्न के रात्रिभोज के दौरान बजट घाटे को सामने लाना राजनीतिक नहीं था।

meaning: To express a harsh truth or critical comment in a gentle, socially acceptable way.
definition: To express a harsh truth or critical comment in a gentle, socially acceptable way.
example: To put it politely, the presentation was a bit disorganized.
exampleHindi: विनम्रता से कहें तो प्रेजेंटेशन थोड़ा अव्यवस्थित था.

meaning: To express or look at a situation in a different, more positive or constructive way.
definition: To express or look at a situation in a different, more positive or constructive way.
example: She helped the team reframe the project delay as an opportunity to perform extra quality checks.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने टीम को परियोजना में देरी को अतिरिक्त गुणवत्ता जांच करने के अवसर के रूप में फिर से परिभाषित करने में मदद की।

meaning: Personal attributes and communication abilities needed for positive and effective workplace interactions.
definition: Personal attributes and communication abilities needed for positive and effective workplace interactions.
example: While technical skills are important, soft skills like active listening are crucial for team success.
exampleHindi: जबकि तकनीकी कौशल महत्वपूर्ण हैं, टीम की सफलता के लिए सक्रिय श्रवण जैसे सॉफ्ट कौशल महत्वपूर्ण हैं।

meaning: To make bad news or a difficult decision seem less harsh or painful.
definition: To make bad news or a difficult decision seem less harsh or painful.
example: He praised her effort on the project first to soften the blow before announcing the budget cuts.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने बजट में कटौती की घोषणा करने से पहले इस झटके को कम करने के लिए परियोजना पर उनके प्रयास की सराहना की।

meaning: To make something difficult or unpleasant seem more appealing or acceptable than it is.
definition: To make something difficult or unpleasant seem more appealing or acceptable than it is.
example: The manager did not sugarcoat the bad news; he told the team directly that layoffs were coming.
exampleHindi: मैनेजर ने बुरी खबर को छुपाया नहीं; उन्होंने टीम को सीधे बताया कि छंटनी होने वाली है।

meaning: Careful not to offend or upset other people in difficult situations.
definition: Careful not to offend or upset other people in difficult situations.
example: Instead of telling the designer their work was poor, the manager gave a tactful response suggesting a few adjustments.
exampleHindi: डिज़ाइनर को यह बताने के बजाय कि उनका काम ख़राब था, प्रबंधक ने कुछ समायोजनों का सुझाव देते हुए एक चतुराईपूर्ण प्रतिक्रिया दी।

meaning: To act or speak very carefully to avoid causing trouble, offense, or mistakes.
definition: To act or speak very carefully to avoid causing trouble, offense, or mistakes.
example: When discussing the merger, we need to tread lightly as employees are worried about job security.
exampleHindi: विलय पर चर्चा करते समय, हमें सावधानी से कदम बढ़ाने की जरूरत है क्योंकि कर्मचारी नौकरी की सुरक्षा को लेकर चिंतित हैं।

meaning: To be extremely careful not to offend or upset someone who is sensitive or easily angered.
definition: To be extremely careful not to offend or upset someone who is sensitive or easily angered.
example: Everyone in the office is treading on eggshells because the boss is in a terrible mood.
exampleHindi: दफ्तर में हर कोई सावधानी बरत रहा है क्योंकि बॉस बहुत खराब मूड में है।

meaning: A statement that describes something as smaller, worse, or less important than it actually is.
definition: A statement that describes something as smaller, worse, or less important than it actually is.
example: To say the product launch was a disaster is an understatement; it was a total failure.
exampleHindi: यह कहना कि उत्पाद का लॉन्च एक आपदा था, एक अतिशयोक्ति होगी; यह पूरी तरह से विफलता थी.

meaning: A polite expression used when you are about to disagree with someone.
definition: A polite expression used when you are about to disagree with someone.
example: With all due respect, I believe the marketing timeline is too optimistic.
exampleHindi: पूरे सम्मान के साथ, मेरा मानना ​​है कि मार्केटिंग की समयसीमा बहुत आशावादी है।

meaning: Willing to listen to and consider new ideas, suggestions, and opinions without bias.
definition: Willing to listen to and consider new ideas, suggestions, and opinions without bias.
example: Please read this proposal with an open mind before making your final decision.
exampleHindi: कृपया अपना अंतिम निर्णय लेने से पहले इस प्रस्ताव को खुले दिमाग से पढ़ें।
